title: OneUnity
description: [VERY WIP] Unifying all spin-off games because they should not go to waste. Bonus legacy features.
body:
This mod has been archived due to being *extremely* outdated.

![forge](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/supported/forge_64h.png)

# OneUnity
  Adds content from the Minecraft spin-offs and some legacy features, because why should all the fun content be restricted to other games and old times?

  Currently, there are only a few simple items (by that I mean a singular ruby from Minecraft Earth), but as this mod's life goes on, there will be more.

## FAQ

**Q: Fabric/Quilt support?**

A: When 2.0.0 comes out, yes.

**Q: Can you port to version 1.x.x?**

A: No* 

**I will likely port to the latest major update, but don't expect a version for every single minor update that Mojang likes to put out. Also, no backports.*

## Roadmap

1. 1.0.0 ~ Legacy Minecraft Features (the good ones)
1. 1.1.0 ~ Minecraft: Earth
1. 1.2.0 ~ Minecraft: Dungeons - Artifacts
1. 1.3.0 ~ Minecraft: Dungeons - Weapons and Armor
1. 1.4.0 ~ Minecraft: Dungeons - Mobs, Workstations, Villagers
1. 1.5.0 ~ Minecraft: Legends
1. 1.6.0 ~ Minecraft: Story Mode - Blocks, Items, Weapons, Armor
1. 1.7.0 ~ Minecraft: Story Mode - Mobs
1. 2.0.0 ~ Fabric and Quilt support
